data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for responsive design for mobile.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the responsive design for mobile, but the provided evidence does not include any specific details or examples demonstrating that this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for responsive design, but there is no concrete evidence showing that the design has been implemented or tested for mobile responsiveness. Therefore, the evidence is insufficient to assert a definitive conclusion regarding this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of responsive design for mobile.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
